name: HYDRAMINI
shortDescription: 6+1 function compact hydrofacial device with LED mask. Jet Peel, RF lifting, ultrasound, cold hammer. Ideal for smaller salons.
description:
The HydraMini is a compact yet professional facial treatment device that includes 6 treatment heads and an LED mask in a single unit.

The advanced oxygen jet peel and hydrodermabrasion device provides deep cleansing, peeling, active ingredient delivery, hydration, and skin firming – painlessly, safely even on sensitive skin.

An ideal choice for smaller salons, beginning estheticians, and mobile service providers seeking a professional solution in a compact size.
metaTitle: HydraMini | 6+1 Function Compact Hydrofacial with LED Mask
metaDescription: HydraMini 6+1 hydrofacial: Jet Peel, RF lifting, ultrasound, cold hammer, LED mask. 169,990 Ft, compact size, professional results.

videoDescription.headline: The HydraMini – professional hydrofacial in a compact size
paragraphs: The HydraMini combines 6 treatment heads and an LED mask in a single compact device, designed for professional use.
The water-oxygen deep cleansing, RF lifting, ultrasound, and cold hammer combination enables a complete facial treatment protocol.
An ideal choice for smaller salons and beginning estheticians seeking a professional solution in a compact size.

afterVideo.text: Have questions about the device? We're happy to help!

featureRows.headline: Why do estheticians choose the HydraMini?
featureRows.subtitle: Compact size, professional results

features.title: 6 treatment heads + LED mask in a single device
features.description:
Spray/atomizer nozzle
Ultrasonic head
Cold hammer
Ultrasonic spatula (skin scrubber)
Hydrodermabrasion head
RF treatment head
LED light therapy face mask

features.title: Water-oxygen deep cleansing and RF lifting
features.description: Water-oxygen deep cleansing helps remove impurities, blackheads, and dead skin cells. Radio frequency (RF) lifting results in firmer, more contoured facial skin in a non-invasive way. Ultrasound promotes active ingredient delivery and provides micromassage.

features.title: LED mask and cold hammer to finish the treatment
features.description: The LED mask provides targeted light therapy for skin regeneration, inflammation reduction, and pigmentation fading. The cold hammer has anti-inflammatory and skin-soothing effects, perfectly finishing off the treatment.

features.title: Compact, lightweight, ideal for smaller salons
features.description: The HydraMini's compact size and light weight make it ideal for smaller salons, home offices, and mobile service providers. Professional performance at an affordable price with minimal space requirements.

training.headline: Operator training – official adult education program
training.intro: A professional operator training course is available for the HydraMini device, provided within the framework of officially registered adult education.
items: HydraMini operating principles, technologies, and treatment heads
Treatment protocols for different skin types and concerns
RF lifting and LED light therapy proper application
Skin analysis basics and personalized treatment plan
closingParagraphs: You are welcome to bring a model to the training so you can learn the treatment techniques in a real-world environment.
Upon completion of the training, we issue an official certificate confirming your competence in the professional operation of the HydraMini device.

expertQuote.quote: The HydraMini is the perfect entry point into the world of hydrofacial treatments. Compact size, professional results – ideal for smaller salons and beginning estheticians.
expertQuote.author: Horváth László

faq.question: What functions does the HydraMini have?
faq.answer: The HydraMini includes 6 treatment heads and an LED mask: spray nozzle, ultrasonic head, cold hammer, ultrasonic spatula (skin scrubber), hydrodermabrasion head, RF treatment head, and LED light therapy face mask.

faq.question: Who is the HydraMini ideal for?
faq.answer: The HydraMini is ideal for smaller cosmetic salons, beginning estheticians, home offices, and mobile service providers. It delivers professional results in a compact size.

faq.question: How quickly does the HydraMini pay for itself?
faq.answer: The HydraMini is available at a very favorable price, so it can pay for itself in as little as 1-2 months with 2-3 clients per day. A hydrofacial treatment is priced between 10,000-20,000 Ft.

faq.question: What skin types is it suitable for?
faq.answer: The HydraMini is suitable for all skin types, including sensitive skin. The treatment is painless and non-invasive.

faq.question: What consumables are needed?
faq.answer: Special serums and solutions are needed for hydrodermabrasion treatments, such as from the HydraLiquid product line. We provide these to our clients at discounted prices.
